title: MikroTik R11e-5HnD - 5GHz miniPCI-e card, 2x MMCX
description: High power 4920-5920MHz 802.11a/n dual chain wireless card in miniPCI-e format. Ideally suited for the new RB912 series, RB800 or our new miniPCIe adapter card - RB14e The card features built-in LED indicators for wireless mode, connection status (connected, searching, disabled), TX and RX activity and wireless signal strength - just looking at the card will help with installation and alignment
specsSearch: Wireless features Sensitivity [dBm] 96 Wireless frequency 5 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 27 Security WPA, WPA2, AES-CCM & TKIP Encryption, 802.1x, 64/128/152bit WEP Connectors and Interfaces Bus type miniPCI-e RF connectors (2) MMCX Power Max. power consumption [W] 5 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 65 Width [mm] 30 Height [mm] 13 Depth [mm] 51
